channel.title: Posts on 君不见的博客
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on 君不见的博客

item.title: Test
item.description: MultiDex接入 Android 修改Plugins/Android/mainTemplate.gradle文件 注：如果接入Base库，修改Assets/_Base/Build/Android/Res/mainTemplate.gradle文件 添加如下代码 android { defaultConfig { ... multiDexEnabled true } ... } dependencies { implementation 'com.android.support:multidex:1.0.3' } 导入MultiDex.unitypackage ​sequence Alice->Bob: Hello Bob, how are you? Note right of Bob: Bob thinks Bob-->Alice: I am good thanks! ​ ​```flow st=>start: Start op=>operation: Your Operation cond=>condition: Yes or No? e=>end st->op->cond cond(yes)->e cond(no)->op ​```
